description:
This quiz evaluates proficiency in modern JavaScript by testing knowledge of feature changes across ECMAScript 2015 through 2022. Delivered in a casual, encouraging tone with multiple-choice questions, it poses a moderate difficulty level that challenges newcomers while remaining accessible to seasoned developers. The lighthearted framing keeps the assessment engaging and low-pressure.
Topics: ECMAScript 2015-2022 updates, Modern JavaScript syntax and features, Language versioning standards, JavaScript skill assessment
Audience: JavaScript developers and students looking to benchmark their knowledge of recent ECMAScript releases.
